completed_tasks.title: Build Advanced Workflow Organization System
completed_tasks.description: Create comprehensive folder management and workflow organization system beyond basic tagging
success_criteria: Hierarchical folder structure for workflows
Drag-and-drop workflow organization UI
Bulk folder operations (move, copy, delete)
Folder-based permissions and sharing
Advanced search within folder hierarchies
Folder export/import capabilities

completed_tasks.title: Fix ALL linting errors throughout codebase
completed_tasks.description: Resolve all linting errors across the entire n8n monorepo. First attempt automatic fixes using npm run lint:fix, then manually fix remaining errors. Run linting in subdirectories to catch all issues. Ensure complete code quality compliance.
success_criteria: All linting errors resolved across entire codebase
npm run lint passes with zero errors and warnings
All subdirectory linting passes
Code meets quality standards

completed_tasks.title: Remove Redundant API Implementations
completed_tasks.description: Clean up codebase by removing implementations that duplicate existing n8n core functionality
success_criteria: Remove redundant authentication implementations (use n8n OAuth2/SAML)
Remove basic execution control (use n8n advanced APIs)
Remove redundant credential sharing (use n8n enterprise RBAC)
Remove redundant workflow export/import (use n8n CLI tools)
Update documentation to reference n8n core APIs
Maintain only unique AI-focused and analytics features

completed_tasks.title: Refocus Project on AI-First Extensions
completed_tasks.description: Pivot project to focus on AI-powered workflow enhancements and analytics rather than reimplementing existing functionality
success_criteria: Enhanced AI node configuration and testing tools
Advanced workflow analytics and optimization engine
AI-powered template recommendations system
Automated workflow optimization suggestions
Integration layer combining n8n APIs with AI enhancements
Clear value proposition as AI-focused n8n extension
